verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This wonderful faith and this super-excellent love Are out of the Triune God, who earnestly desires To be joined to us to be our everything

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This Triune God passed through the process Of incarnation, crucifixion, resurrection from the dead And ascension to the heavens on high And was ultimately consummated as the life-giving Spirit

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This Spirit of Life who includes divinity Humanity and Christ's crucifixion Resurrection and ascension and is the reality Of the all-inclusive Christ Dwells in our regenerated spirit Dwells in our regenerated spirit
